title: Marc Anthony Repairing Hair Mask, Repair Bond +Rescuplex - Repairs, Strengthens & Maintains Bonds within Hair - Eliminates Frizz, Flyaways & Reduce Breakage - Dry & Damaged Hair Professional Treatment
description:
About this item
Repair Bond +Rescuplex Hair Mask: Hair fiber is made up of bonds that give it strength, which can be damaged by things like hair color, daily styling, and pollution. As part of the Marc Anthony Repair Bond system, this Hair Mask infuses maximum hydration while protecting your hair from future damage, alleviating frizz, and boosting shine. For best results, use with the full Repair Bond +Rescuplex system of Shampoo, Conditioner, Leave-In Treatment and Mask. 8 oz.
Stay Strong: The Repair Bond system is formulated with Rescuplex, a complex developed to rebuild and maintain hair’s damaged bonds, including disulfide bonds. Designed with added ingredients like rice bran oil, rosemary oil, hydrolyzed quinoa and vitamin C, the Repair Bond +Rescuplex system is proven to result in hair that feels 111% stronger, 140% smoother and with 129% more shine.
How To Use: Apply to clean, wet hair after shampooing. Leave on for 3-5 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Use 1-2 times per week. For best results, use with the full Repair Bond System: Shampoo, Conditioner and Leave-In Treatment. If using a conditioner, apply and rinse the mask before conditioning. Perfect for all hair types.
Endless Haircare Innovation: Marc Anthony’s team of style-makers and beauty lovers never sit still, traveling the world to bring you the best ingredients to create professional quality products. Repair Bond +Rescuplex is Vegan, Cruelty-Free, Paraben-Free, Sulfate-Free, and Phthalate-Free.
True Experts in Hair: Hair doesn’t need to be complicated. Marc Anthony’s mission is to make your hair play easy with premium, fool-proof products at an affordable price. All the styles. All the fun. We do what it takes to make hair play possible.

title: MERACH Under Desk Elliptical Machine, Ellipse Leg Exerciser for Seniors Adults Fully Assembled, Portable & Quiet Electric Seated Pedal Exerciser with 12 Adjustable Speed & Remote Control & 12 AutoMode
description:
About this item
Zero Pressure, Low Strength: The MERACH under desk ellipse exercise machine features a low-intensity, zero-pressure design that promotes blood circulation, burns calories, strengthens lower body muscles, and helps prevent leg diseases. It is the perfect elliptical leg exerciser while sitting for seniors, sedentary office workers, and those in leg rehabilitation. Get an effective workout in comfort and improve your overall health.
12 Scientific Automatic Modes: The ellipse leg exerciser offers 12 automatic modes (P1-P12) and 12 manual speed levels, allowing you to enjoy professional-level exercise guidance. Equipped with a remote control, you don’t need to bend down to make adjustments. The pedals allow for both forward and backward movement, engaging every muscle group to ensure a more effective workout.
Superior Quiet Motor: The MERACH under desk elliptical machine comes with the latest E4 silent motor, designed for low noise and long-term, high-frequency use. Switching between low and high speeds happens without lag, offering a smooth, quiet exercise experience. The eco-friendly rubber base prevents the mini elliptical from shifting, ensuring a stable workout whether you are working or watching TV.
Portable Design: This elliptical training machine features a portable handle and is lightweight, making it easy to move anywhere. Its compact size doesn’t take up extra space, so you can easily place it under a desk or in other tight spots. Portable exercise equipment enables you to work out anytime, anywhere! This flexibility lets you work out anytime, anywhere, making it easy to keep up with your routine, even in your busy life.
Note: Avoid using this device with other electronic medical devices like pacemakers, and do not use it if you have steel plates or other surgical fixtures in your body. These safety precautions are essential for ensuring proper use.
No Installation Required: The pedal exerciser is ready to use right out of the box, making it ideal for seniors and those in leg rehabilitation. MERACH combines cutting-edge technology with home exercise equipment, trusted by over a million families for superior products and service.
One-Click Control: Whether you’re focusing on work or taking a break, simply touch the remote control buttons to adjust the intensity and mode of your exercise. The high-definition LCD screen clearly displays real-time data to help you stay in rhythm with your workout. Its user-friendly design makes it easy for anyone to start and enjoy a healthy lifestyle.

title: Ultra Thin Pillow for Sleeping- Cooling Gel Flat Pillow for Stomach and Back Sleepers, Slim Stomach Sleeping Pillow for Shoulder Neck Pain Relief, Low Profile Memory Foam Pillows with Washable Cover
description:
About this item
【Natural Cooling Memory Foam Pillow】This slim sleeping pillow is filled with memory foam. The filling is equipped with small ventilation holes that help regulate body temperature as you sleep. On top of that, with silky ice fabric on one side and soft rayon on the other. These natural materials help reduce moisture and create a cool sleep experience
【SLIM DESIGN FOR STOMACH AND BACK SLEEPERS】A low profile, relatively flat pillow works well for extra support while sleeping that keeps your head, neck and spine in neutral alignment, meaning your body rests in a "horizontal straight line." You can place a thin or flat pillow under your stomach, lower back or knees to relieve pressure on the hips, spine and lower back
【PRESSURE RELIEF AND NECK SUPPORT】 Ultra Thin pillow is better for someone who usually sleeps on their back and fills the space between the back of the head and the neck, reducing and preventing muscle tension to help reduce snoring and back pain. The stomach sleeper pillow is a solid medium firmness and adaptable enough to be stacked to match the individual's exact height preference when it comes to their sleep
【Removeable, Machine Washable Cooling Pillow Cover】The and polyester cool slim pillow cover may help with cooling at night, and to keep your memory foam pillow clean from sweat, dust, and germs, the pillowcase is machine washable
【PREMIUM, SUPPORTIVE MEMORY FOAM】The Iwacool memory foam has been certified by CertiPUR-US and Oeko-Tex as having minimal VOC emissions and being of formaldehyde, mercury, lead, and other heavy metals, ensuring a restful night's sleep without worrying about any harmful substances
【PERFECT PILLOWS FOR ALL sleepers】A wonderful pillow for Christmas Day, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, New Year's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Easter, Graduation, Baby Shower, Promotion or Job Anniversary. You know, everyone needs a cooling and comfortable pillow for a better sleep
